content:
Here's a short overview of the Awakener Miryam!
https://youtube.com/shorts/Vapqe7a_Ih0?si=fPZNuz3FdcVaRgIR

embeds.title: Morimens: Murphy: Fauxborn Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lov...
embeds.description:
"Draped in black, Miryam's emaciated body was concealed beneath her robes. Silent, she bore a countenance of devout sorrow, much like the virgin in a mural, exuding endless mystery. She poured her entire being into waiting for a special moment. It is almost here, the appointed day draws near."

This
